note: This patch adds the 3-1 quadratic function unit as a middle school grade 3 diagnosis unit. It is built cumulatively on the 20260707 quadratic equation index so M3_QUADRATIC_EQUATION is not dropped when index.v1.json is overwritten. Original source images are not included.
apply_note: Apply after math_weakness_engine_m3_quadratic_equation_core_patch_20260707.zip if the current repository does not yet contain M3_QUADRATIC_EQUATION files.
